violations.text: The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine at the bar. New Violation. Correct By: 02/04/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the floor under draft machine have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 02/29/2024
The receptacle in the women's toilet room is lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. New Violation. Correct By: 02/06/2024
The floor behind the bar area in the men's restroom is poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 01/29/2025
